content.en:
Ye Tian's copy body became the ancestor, and many of the Dark Destruction Domain's Peerless Domain Ancestors withdrew one after another, and even many of the Dark Saint Domain's Saint Gates withdrew the Ascendant Domain Ancestors.

There is no way, the human race has given birth to an ancestor and controls a part of the Dark Soul Domain.

Although the Ancestor can't easily kill the Ancestor of the Superior Domain, it doesn't mean that the Ancestor can't trap the Ancestor of the Peerless Domain, and he can't injure the Ancestor of the Peerless Domain.

It can be said that as long as the Qingye Ancestor creates a little trouble for those Peerless Domain Ancestors, or locks the location of the Peerless Domain Ancestors, Ye Tian alone can sweep these Peerless Domain Ancestors and easily kill these Peerless Domain Ancestors.

In the Dark Soul Domain, no peerless Domain Ancestor could evade the detection of the Aoba Ancestor.

In order to prevent the Peerless Domain Ancestor from continuing to lose, these forces naturally did not dare to let the Peerless Domain Ancestor stay in the Dark Soul Domain, otherwise it would be easy to fall.

The unsuperior domain ancestors who really dared to stay in the Dark Soul Domain were almost all the unsurpassed domain ancestors of the Battle Gate and the unadvanced domain ancestors who had a good relationship with the Battle Gate, and these forces said hello to the ancestors of the Battle Gate and Ye Tian, and Ye Tian naturally would not attack them.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian controlled the Primordial Ancestral Realm of the Dark Soul Domain, and with the strength of the doppelganger ancestor, it was not difficult to block the primordial ancestral realm, and he could even drive away all the Peerless Domain Ancestors and Peerless Soul Ancestors.

He will not be merciful, he will only allow the Domain Ancestor and Soul Ancestor of the Human Race, as well as the Soul Ancestor and Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate to enter the Primordial Ancestral Realm, it is impossible for other forces to enter.

In the Dark Souls Domain, no one can resist the Aoba Ancestor.

This is like the place where the Dark Sanctuary was born, the Dark Gate is the oldest and most powerful Gate, and all good things have fallen into the hands of the Dark Gate.

It's just because the Dark Holy Gate has the Holy Ancestor, the most powerful ancestor.

Of course, in addition to the Holy Ancestor, the current Dark Holy Gate also has two ancestors, but it is a pity that the strength of those two ancestors is average, so in addition to the Holy Ancestor, the strength of the Dark Holy Gate does not occupy an advantage in the top ten Holy Gates, but there are no higher domain ancestors.

Moreover, the current Dark Sanctuary has no way to increase the strength of the Holy Ancestor.

Coupled with the fact that the other Ancestors worked together to contain the Holy Ancestor, even the Holy Ancestor would not be able to dominate the Dark Sanctuary.

The Dark Soul Domain will also be in the future, and he will not be able to obtain the increase of the Dark Soul Domain sooner or later, because the increase has a time effect, that is, 100,000 realm years.

If after 100,000 realm years, the strength of the Aoba Ancestor is not strong, and some territory will still be divided by other ancestors, which is also an inevitable thing.

......

this day.

Ye Tian also sent his family into the Dark Soul Domain, after all, the Dark Soul Domain was currently safer than the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

Moreover, Ye Tian hoped that his family would enjoy the treatment of the Primordial Ancestral Spring.

After all, Ye Tian's wife, daughter, son, and sister were now cultivated with all his might, and they had all been promoted to the realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, but they were only in the early stage of the Peerless Domain Ancestor.

Once they entered the Primordial Ancestral Spring, they could easily forbid their advancement to the Peerless Domain Ancestor Peak Realm.

In addition, several other Terran Superior Domain Ancestors have also broken through to the peak realm of Peerless Domain Ancestors, and the strength of that Terran is very terrifying, even stronger than a Holy Gate.

Another period of time has passed.

On this day, the primordial ancestral spring of the primordial ancestral realm was born, Ye Tian's body and the unsurpassed domain ancestors of the human race came here one after another, and those non-superior domain ancestors of the battle gate also came here, and they were all about to enter the primordial ancestral spring to obtain the benefits of the primordial ancestral spring.

The Peerless Peak Domain Ancestor can obtain the second Peerless Domain Body Transformation, and the benefits are the greatest.

And other Peerless Domain Ancestors can also quickly refine the Peerless Domain Body, and their cultivation will increase rapidly, which is also a benefit.

"Wanfa War Ancestor, this time thanks to your Terran Ancestor's Aoba Ancestor, otherwise, if these Superior Domain Ancestors of our Battle Gate want to enter the Primordial Ancestral Spring, I am afraid that they will need to go through a fierce battle, and a Peerless Domain Ancestor like me is not qualified to come in at all!"

Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor said with a smile.

Indeed, he is only in the middle stage realm of a superior domain ancestor, his strength is too weak, and there are too many peerless domain ancestors who are stronger than him.

But this time, he was lucky, he could enter the Primordial Ancestral Spring, once he was tempered by the Primordial Ancestral Spring Spring water, completed the second transformation of the Peerless Domain Body, and broke the extreme of the Peerless Domain Body, it was hopeless, but he could improve his cultivation to the peak realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor.

When the time comes, he will also belong to the most powerful group of peerless domain ancestors in the Dark Sanctuary.

"Let's all go in and cultivate, whoever can get better benefits depends on their ability!"

Ye Tian said.

After all, such a terrifying opportunity of the Primordial Ancestral Spring only existed when the Primordial Ancestral Realm was born, and it did not exist all the time, it was a one-time consumption opportunity, once the spring water of the Primordial Ancestral Spring was exhausted, there was no way to continue to be born.

Once, when the Dark Sacred Domain was born, the Holy Ancestor and several Ancestors used the Primordial Ancestral Spring Spring Water to complete the accumulation of the Ancestor of the Peerless Domain from the early stage to the peak realm, so that they could break through to the Ancestor Realm in a short period of time.

Otherwise, the Holy Ancestor would not have been able to break through to the Ancestor Realm before the Ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain descended.

The Terran Clan's Superior Domain Ancestors, and the Warrior Gate's Superior Domain Ancestors have entered the Primordial Ancestral Spring.

Rumble!!!!

The energy of the Primordial Ancestral Spring poured into their bodies, helping them refine their Peerless Domains.

While these Superior Domain Ancestors were cultivating, many Ancestors outside the Dark Soul Domain left, and many Peerless Domain Ancestors also left.

After all, in the Dark Soul Domain where the Ancestor of Aoba was, the major forces would not be able to reap any benefits, even if they fought outside, what would it do?

Therefore, they simply left.

When we wait for 100 realm years, the ancestor can come, and then we will settle the score.

From now on, to the 100th realm year, the Dark Soul Domain is almost under the control of the Terrans.

Time passed slowly, and the energy of the primordial ancestral spring continued to decrease.

In particular, Ye Tian absorbed too much primordial ancestral spring energy, and at such an absorption rate, I am afraid that there are many peerless domain ancestors who are unable to raise their cultivation to the peak realm of peerless domain ancestors.

Everyone is trying to absorb it, but the strength of some of the Superior Domain Ancestors is too low, and the speed of absorption is too slow.

"Almost, my super-superior domain can transform again, breaking the extreme of the non-super-level domain!"

Ye Tian muttered.
